title: Bombay High Court rejects Goa miner’s bid to revive lease despite Supreme Court ban, imposes ₹5 lakh costs
description: The Goa Bench of the Bombay High Court has imposed ₹5 lakh costs on a Goa mining company, Shantilal Khushaldas & Brothers Private Limited, while dismissing its plea to revive an old mining lease [Shantilal Khushaldas & Brothers Pvt Ltd v. State of Goa]In a judgment delivered on May 8, a Division Bench of Justices Valmiki Menezes and Amit S Jamsandekar said the issue had already been settled by the Supreme Court in Goa Foundation v.
